overview.description: The Carbon Collective Short Duration Green Bond ETF (CCSB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is actively managed, seeking maximum total return while promoting environmental sustainability through a diversified portfolio of corporate bonds denominated in various currencies. The fund maintains a weighted-average investment grade rating and an average duration of under five years. CCSB was launched on Apr 11, 2024 and is issued by Carbon Collective.
